programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programme.title: Liger: Saala Crossbreed
programme.desc: A young and skilled MMA fighter puts in rigorous effort to climb the ladder of success. Unfortunately, his aspirations face a major setback when his beloved partner is abducted. Mike Tyson, Ananya Pandey, Vijay Deverakonda, Ronit Roy, Ramya Krishnan, Puri Jagannadh, Puri Jagannadh, Prashant Pandey.

programme.title: Patna Shuklla
programme.desc: When a helpless student has nowhere to turn to except a housewife who's also a small-time lawyer, they uncover a quagmire of an educational scam. Vivek Budakoti.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Patna Shuklla
programme.desc: When a helpless student has nowhere to turn to except a housewife who's also a small-time lawyer, they uncover a quagmire of an educational scam. Vivek Budakoti.

programme.title: 102 Not Out
programme.desc: While the 75 years old son is sick of his life, the 102 years old dad seeks to break the oldest-man-alive record. Nevertheless, he tries to push his son to seize a better life. Amitabh Bachchan, Rishi Kapoor, Jimit Trivedi, Ashok Pathak, Umesh Shukla, Saumya Joshi, Vijay Raaz.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programme.title: Veere Di Wedding
programme.desc: When Kalandi breaks up with her fiance, she joins her childhood friends who plan for a holiday that may lighten the mood. Kareena Kapoor, Sonam Kapoor, Swara Bhaskar, Shikha Talsania, Sumeet Vyas, Shashanka Ghosh, Nidhi Mehra.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.desc: When Kalandi breaks up with her fiance, she joins her childhood friends who plan for a holiday that may lighten the mood. Kareena Kapoor, Sonam Kapoor, Swara Bhaskar, Shikha Talsania, Sumeet Vyas, Shashanka Ghosh, Nidhi Mehra.

programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Veere Di Wedding
programme.desc: When Kalandi breaks up with her fiance, she joins her childhood friends who plan for a holiday that may lighten the mood. Kareena Kapoor, Sonam Kapoor, Swara Bhaskar, Shikha Talsania, Sumeet Vyas, Shashanka Ghosh, Nidhi Mehra.

programme.title: Hungama 2
programme.desc: Aakash is in trouble after his ex-girlfriend shows up at his door with a child, claiming he is the father. Paresh Rawal, Meezaan Jafri, Shilpa Shetty Kundra, Pranitha Subhash, Priyadarshan , Anukalp Goswami, Abilash Nair.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programme.title: Khel Khel Mein
programme.desc: What happens when a group of friends agree to play a game—making their phones public property for the night? A roller-coaster ride filled with twists and drama begins! Mudassar Aziz.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.
